prompt: A stylized rubber duck leading a pirate ship on stormy seas
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork depicting the yellow rubber duck from image 1, rendered in a dramatic, illustrative style and scaled to a colossal size. This monumental duck is positioned prominently in the foreground, leading a classic wooden pirate ship with tattered black sails and skull and crossbones flags, which follows closely behind. Both the duck and the ship are on a vast, tumultuous dark stormy sea with towering, frothing waves. The ominous sky above is filled with dark storm clouds, illuminated by flashes of distant lightning, creating an epic and dramatic atmosphere.
objects: colossal yellow rubber duck in foreground
classic wooden pirate ship following closely behind
